lines.speaker: Isadora
lines.text: Hello again, funny person. Have you been helping the ents?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet, but I suppose I probably should.

lines.speaker: Isadora
lines.text: The ents like it when you help. They'll give you more gifts!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I do always like a gift. I was wondering though, do you know why these totems are so important to the ents?

lines.speaker: Isadora
lines.text: But daddy says they're very important. He says the ents need the totems. Without them, the ents would be all sad, and then the whole valley would be all dead and sad!

lines.speaker: Isadora
lines.text: That's why we have to help them! Daddy lets me help them sometimes, but I'm only allowed to help them here. Mummy says it's too dangerous for me to go out into the valley on my own. She says there are monsters!

lines.speaker: Isadora
lines.text: I don't know if that's true... I think the ents would stop any monsters! But mummy and daddy get all grumpy if I don't listen.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And I'm sure nobody wants mummy and daddy to be grumpy!

lines.speaker: Isadora
lines.text: Too right. Anyway, goodbye, funny person. Don't forget to help the ents!
